summary: Tested is_factory flag for warehouse locations and is_self_managed flag for distributors. All 14 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI elements verified working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test distributors and locations with TEST_FLAG_ prefix during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: is_factory and is_self_managed flags are fully implemented and working. Backend APIs support create/update/get for both flags. Frontend shows Self Managed badge in distributor list, Self Managed checkbox in create/edit dialogs, Factory badge on location cards, and Factory checkbox in add location dialog.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/distributors without is_self_managed (defaults to false) - PASSED
POST /api/distributors/{id}/locations without is_factory (defaults to false) - PASSED
GET /api/distributors/{id} returns is_factory on locations - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Distributor List - Self Managed badge displayed (3 badges found) - PASSED
Create Distributor Dialog - Self Managed checkbox present (data-testid: distributor-self-managed-checkbox) - PASSED
Profile Tab Edit Mode - Self Managed checkbox present (data-testid: edit-self-managed-checkbox) - PASSED
Location Cards - Factory badge displayed (3 badges found) - PASSED
Add Location Dialog - Factory checkbox present (data-testid: location-factory-checkbox) - PASSED
